description: Quote Trust Score Algorithm - determines how much influence a submitted quote has on pricing calibration

factors.name: has_price
factors.description: Quote includes a specific total price (not a range)

factors.name: has_contractor
factors.description: Contractor/company name was extracted or provided

factors.name: has_address
factors.description: Property address or city/state was provided

factors.name: has_scope_items
factors.description: At least 3 scope items were detected in the quote

factors.name: has_roof_size
factors.description: Roof size in squares or sqft was detected

factors.name: price_in_range
factors.description: Price is within 0.5x to 2.0x of model estimate (not an obvious outlier)

factors.name: uploaded_document
factors.description: User uploaded an actual PDF/image (not just typed in numbers)

factors.name: unique_session
factors.description: IP/session hasn't submitted more than 3 quotes in 24 hours

factors.name: consistent_math
factors.description: Line items add up to within 10% of total (if line items detected)

factors.name: realistic_per_sqft
factors.description: Price per sqft falls within $2-$35 range (not absurd)
